headline: Yum! Brands Is Selling One Of America's Most Iconic Pizza Chains For $2.3 Billion— Here's What To Know
summary: On Tuesday, Yum Brands Inc. confirmed the sale of its subsidiary, Pizza Hut, to private equity firm LongRange Capital for nearly $1.5 billion. The Mainland China operations of Pizza Hut will be taken over by Yum China Holdings, Inc. for...

headline: Chips Crack the Rally - Dow Keeps Climbing, SpaceX Passes Amazon
summary: Monday's all-everything rally lasted exactly one session. Tuesday was the kind of split tape that reminds you why an index print can hide more than it reveals, the Dow Jones pushed to another record while the semiconductor complex got taken to the woodshed.

headline: Yum Brands Slices Up Pizza Hut in $2.7 Billion Sale
